summary: US-017 browser smoke tests are complete. The smoke test file (tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts) was already generated in a prior commit with 5 tests covering all acceptance criteria: app loads without errors, canvas is visible with rendered pixels, all 3 preset buttons visible, preset switching moves active class, and canvas continues rendering after preset switch. All quality gates pass: lint, typecheck, 152 unit tests, and 27 e2e tests (including the 5 new smoke tests). Updated progress log.
